etymology.interpretation: The character combines the imagery of two outstretched feet and a hand with a stick, reflecting an action such as beating or cutting grass. It likely served as the original form of ć’Ą(ć’Ą) (bĹŤ, "to push aside"), evolving into a phonetic component.
